metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Drama, Mystery, Romance, Supernatural Tags:Detective/Heterosexual/Aliens The second season of Tantei wa mou, Shindeiru.

metas.name: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd STAGE
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Cowboys/Foreign/Male Protagonist/Disability/Primarily Adult Cast The second race stage of JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: Steel Ball Run.

In the 2nd STAGE, a desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles- the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." In 1875, a threat lurking in said desert wiped out a cavalry of 26 people, eliciting fear from the local native people. As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition. The two press forward, where countless hidden motives collide.

(Source: Warner Bros. Japan Anime, Netflix Anime, edited)

metas.name: Aoashi 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Sports Tags:Football/Seinen/Male Protagonist The second season of Aoashi.

metas.name: Tensei Kizoku, Kantei Skill de Nariagaru 3rd Season
metas.description: Genres: Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Isekai The third season of Tensei Kizoku, Kantei Skill de Nariagaru.

metas.name: Hotaru no Yomeiri
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Romance Tags:Yandere/Josei/Assassins/Heterosexual/Historical/Prostitution On the surface, Satoko has it all—she’s beautiful, the daughter of a nobleman, and at a prime age for marriage. Unfortunately, she is also quite ill and only has a short time left to live. Before she can secure a marriage that will redeem her worth in her family’s eyes, she finds herself the target of the mysterious assassin Shinpei, and her plans are put in jeopardy. In order to save herself, she makes a desperate proposal—of marriage! When it comes to love, however, Shinpei takes “until death do we part” seriously.

(Source: VIZ Media)

metas.name: Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon Falls Arc
metas.description: Genres: Action, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Shounen/Demons/Guns Sequel to Tougen Anki.

metas.name: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure Tags:Super Power/Martial Arts/Shounen/Gods/Henshin/Male Protagonist/Aliens Dragon Ball Super: Beerus, a project that was started a few years ago, is the newly ENHANCED edition of the anime Dragon Ball Super. ENHANCED by the latest visual expression, every scene, especially the battle scenes, is even more immersive, providing a more faithful and detailed reproduction of the original work by Akira Toriyama, and it will deliver a quality that is sure to fully satisfy audiences.

(Source: Dragon Ball Official Site)

metas.name: Magic Knight Rayearth (2026)
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Mahou Shoujo, Mecha Tags:Female Protagonist/Shoujo/Isekai/Tomboy/Magic/Super Power/Super Robot/Henshin/Medieval/Primarily Female Cast/Ojou-sama/Primarily Child Cast/Robots/Swordplay/Archery In celebration of "Magic Knight Rayearth” animes' 30th anniversary, a new animation project has been launched!

Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

metas.name: Tenshou shita Dai Seijo wa, Seijo de Aru Koto wo Hita Kakusu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Dragons Fia always dreamed of becoming a knight. Born into a family of knights, she’s the least talented among them, but she still clutches to her hope and trains with everything she has. When the day comes for her to slay a small demon and prove her worth, she ends up face to face with a dragon instead! A deadly injury makes her life flash before her eyes…and she suddenly remembers her former life, when she was a powerful Saint in a bygone era who defeated the Demon King. That life ended in pain because of who she was, making her fear ever becoming a Saint again. Now that the magic from her previous life has been rekindled, she may become a more powerful knight than she ever dreamed–if only she can survive long enough!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: PSYЯEN
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi Tags:Shounen/Death Game/Dystopian/Super Power/Male Protagonist One day, high schooler Ageha Yoshina picks up a mysterious “red phone card” left behind in a public telephone booth. A few days later, his childhood friend and classmate, Sakurako Amamiya—who possessed the same card—suddenly vanishes without a trace. In search of her, Ageha finds himself drawn into the rumors surrounding a nationwide string of mysterious disappearances, said to be the work of a secret organization known only as “Psyren.”

When he accesses the group, a deadly game begins—one that will change his fate forever.

(Source: Official Site)

metas.name: Mahou Shoujo Ikusei Keikaku: restart
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Mahou Shoujo, Thriller Tags:Female Protagonist/Magic/Kuudere/Primarily Female Cast A stage reading in the Magical Girl Raising Project franchise announced that an anime adaptation of Asari Endou's Magical Girl Raising Project Restart light novel volumes has been green-lit. Hiroyuki Hashimoto reported on Twitter that he will return from the first Magical Girl Raising Project anime as the director. The franchise's Twitter account also teased that various initiatives are in the works for "Project restart."

(Source: Anime News Network)

metas.name: Toaru Anbu no ITEM
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Sci-Fi Tags: This is a story of four girls living in the "Dark Side" of Academy City.

In Academy City where "ESP" has been recognized as a general science. Behind the peace, there is a Dark Side organization that undertakes missions that cannot be made public.

"ITEM" is an elite unit consisting of four girls. Takitsubo Rikou is able to read and track the AIM fields emitted by those with abilities. Frenda Seivelun, who excels in combat using explosives and traps.

Kinuhata Saiai, who can manipulate nitrogen at will and plays a defensive role. And one of the 7 Espers that Academy City is proud of: Mugino Shizuri. They live freely in the darkness of the Academy City, and quietly set their sights on their target...!

This is a story of encounter, friendship, and darkness that eventually leads to a terrible incident!

(Source: Kadokawa, translated)

metas.name: Kyouran Reijou Nia Liston
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist A great hero lies undefeated on her deathbed, regretting that she never found a foe who could take her down. She never intended to meet her fate anywhere other than on the battlefield, and her peaceful demise has her wishing desperately that things could have been different... But when she suddenly comes to in the body of the young, frail Nia Liston, she’s got an all-new fight ahead of her. Nia is a sickly child, meaning she has a long way to go before she’s in fighting form. Now that she’s been given a second shot at life, however, she’s determined to get what she wants. She’s going to live—and die—for battle this time! Make way for the Merciless Maiden!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

metas.name: Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Mecha, Romance, Sci-Fi Tags:Female Harem/Space/Heterosexual/Isekai/Space Opera/Elf Sato Takahiro was an ordinary office worker and hobbyist gamer until the day he woke up on a spaceship–one that strangely resembled a craft from a favorite space-shooter game. With a decked-out ship, a crew full of babes, and a fantastic universe to explore, he's going to make the most of his good luck and create the life he's always dreamed of!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Magical★Explorer: Eroge no Yuujin Chara ni Tensei Shitakedo, Game Chishiki Tsukatte Jiyuu ni Ikiru
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Magic/Isekai/Female Harem/School/Male Protagonist Few titles are more revered among horndogs-(ahem) connoisseurs of Japanese erotic video games-than Magical Explorer. One day, our smut-loving hero wakes up to find he has been reincarnated into the body of the game’s dreamboat protagonist! Or rather, his hapless comic-relief best friend, Kousuke Takioto. But with his unparalleled knowledge of Magical Explorer and Kousuke’s unorthodox abilities (a scarf that doubles as a fist?), our hero vows to turn the game’s unluckiest loser into its mightiest heartthrob. In this world, nothing is out of reach when you’ve got the know-how!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Hotel Inhumans 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Action, Drama Tags: The second season of Hotel Inhumans.

metas.name: #Zombie Sagashitemasu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Zombie/Post-Apocalyptic/Female Protagonist The manga is set in a world where 90 percent of humans on Earth have contracted and died from a deadly, virulent disease; only to then rise again as zombies who only attack people. 13 years after that "Red Day" of societal and civilizational collapse, the surviving humans survive away from the big cities, while still hoping to retake them someday. An entirely new generation of people who know nothing of the pre-Red Day world are now coming into their own. The story begins when Aki and her close friends Haru and Natsuki begin a journey to find Aki's missing father.

(Source: Anime News Network)

metas.name: Kyoufu Collector
metas.description:
Genres: Horror, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Youkai/Urban Fantasy Urban legends come to life…Everyone’s heard an urban legend before, but few have ever come face-to-face with one. These phenomena are everywhere, existing in the shadows of reality. More and more of them have been appearing in the wake of the faceless kid sighted all over Japan. If you see her or one of the urban legends she brings―pray the boy in the red hood finds you before it’s too late. You won’t stand a chance on your own. But with his help, you may just live to see another day…

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Gensou Suikoden
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags: During Suikoden Live Broadcast, Konami announced Suikoden: The Anime, an anime adaptation of Suikoden II. Suikoden: The Anime will be the first anime series directly handled by Konami Animation.

(Source: finalweapon.net)

metas.name: TANK CHAIR: Sensha Isu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Sci-Fi Tags:Disability/Full CGI Shizuka takes on the most dangerous of assassin jobs, but she's not the one doing the killing. Rather, it's her brother, Nagi, a strong assassin who took a bullet to protect his sister, leaving him in a comatose state and having to use a wheelchair. However, Shizuka has figured out the key to waking her brother up: he must be faced with killing intent! Thus begins a violent journey of recovery, battling the most dangerous foes!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

metas.name: Tensei Goblin Dakedo Shitsumon Aru?
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Goblin/Magic Office worker Akira Yagami’s altruistic nature usually gets him the short end of the stick. When he dies after saving a kid from oncoming traffic...he reincarnates in another world as a goblin?! Normally, goblins only live for seven days, but Akira’s newfound powers let him defy the species’ normal life span...and are the key to his path to becoming the strongest goblin ever!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Choujun! Choujou Senpai
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life
Tags:Police/Primarily Adult Cast/Super Power/Surreal Comedy/Urban/Shounen/Meta
In Chinjuku, the city that never sleeps, there is a psychic senior police officer who has powers beyond human comprehension! His name is Meguru Chojo! Along with his judo expert partner Nao Ippongi, this hilarious duo will keep the streets clean by any means necessary!

metas.name: Tetsuryou! meet with Tetsudou Musume
metas.description:
Genres: Slice of Life Tags:Trains/Female Protagonist/Cute Girls Doing Cute Things/Iyashikei "I want to escape my daily routine and go on a trip somewhere." I've thought that many times. Days when I don't even know what I want to be in the future. But someday, I want to find something I can get really into.

As the campus was buzzing with excitement at the start of a new day, the members of the Railway Travel Club (commonly known as the Tetsuryou-kai) reached out to Misaki. As the world spreads out through the tracks, her heart begins to beat faster!

As the Tetsudou Musume (Railway Girls) celebrate their 20th anniversary, the Tetsuryou-kai travels their world in search of excitement.

(Source: Official Site, translated)

metas.name: Junket Bank
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Psychological, Thriller
Tags:Seinen/Male Protagonist/Gambling/Primarily Adult Cast
Mitarai, a bank clerk bored with his everyday life and work, soon finds himself transferred to the "Appraisal Unit." Guided by his new boss Usami, Mitarai's led through a secret underground passage within the bank where a new, exciting world of gambling awaits.

metas.name: Shin Tennis no Ouji-sama: U-17 WORLD CUP Kesshou Member Ketteisen
metas.description: Genres: Action, Comedy, Sports Tags:Tennis/Shounen/Primarily Male Cast/Male Protagonist/Ensemble Cast/Foreign/Primarily Teen Cast Sequel to Shin Tennis no Ouji-sama: U-17 WORLD CUP SEMIFINAL.

metas.name: Battle Spirits [Re] Zekkai No Ku
metas.description: Genres: Action Tags:Card Battle New Battle Spirits TV Anime.

metas.name: Pan Dorobou
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy Tags:Crime Kadokawa announced on June 9th, 2025 that Keiko Shibata's Pan Dorobou (Bread Thief) picture book will have an anime adaptation. The announcement did not reveal the anime's format. The picture books center on a piece of bread that also steals bread from bakeries in the city.

(Source: Anime News Network)
